title: I spent a week wearing the Samsung Galaxy XR headset, and it put my Meta Quest Pro in the shade in so many ways — but after two days I knew that I need a better head strap
summary: Just to be clear, I didn't wear the Galaxy XR headset 24/7 — I haven't been walking around my local supermarket immersed in XR, or sleeping in my Samsung headset .
